ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "fig_id" TEXT /* Figure ID of the product */,
  "bl_fig_id" TEXT /* Backlog Figure ID of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Current status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  "product_cost" REAL /* Cost of producing the product */,
  "product_suggested_price" REAL /* Suggested retail price of the product */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x5x2 cm) */,
  "product_materials" TEXT /* Materials used in the product (e.g., Plastic, Fabric) */,
  "product_age_range" TEXT /* Recommended age range for the product (e.g., 3-6 years) */,
  "product_safety_info" TEXT /* Safety information for the product (e.g., Choking hazard for children under 3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "main_category" TEXT /* Main category of the product */,
  "sub_categories" TEXT /* Subcategories of the product */,
  "prod_year" INTEGER /* Year the product was produced */,
  "in_collection" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the product is in the current collection (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_categories FOREIGN KEY ("sub_categories") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "main_category_name" TEXT /* Main category name */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the subcategory image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the inventory falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production */,
  "quantity_produced" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product produced */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the production run */,
  "production_materials" TEXT /* Materials used in the production run */,
  "production_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the production run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the product was sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, retail store) */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale (including tax and discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, staff, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator if the user account is active (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
